creator: george@m5p.com
text: To answer many of your questions about the drm_modeset_is_locked message, may I direct your attention to the second attachment to the bug: https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=238849.  TL;DR: It's never literally first, but it's pretty close to first and there are always multiple, multiple copies of it that are impossible to ignore.
